recommended_overlap_notes: Same UNITI/ustekinumab Crohn family as DS107. Public GEO sample titles share CNTO1275CRD3002 UNITI-2 subject identifiers with DS107; direct matrix check confirms 115 overlapping unique subject IDs. Do not count as fully independent from DS107. Not an exact duplicate because DS047 profiles terminal ileum arrays across week 0/week 8/week 44 plus controls.
component_decision: Keep component_of_dataset_id blank because DS047 is not a clean parent of DS107; rows overlap by subject IDs but differ by tissue and timepoint structure.
